title: Vivi Faces Her Choice
description: On pages 7, 8, 9, 10, this part focuses on the silent x-mark farewell. Vivi and the Straw Hats part ways without words, using their shared mark to prove their friendship while protecting her from the Navy.
scene: This scene belongs to the The Silent X-Mark Farewell sequence. The important beat is the dialogue and action around Luffy, Vivi, Nami, Usopp, Sanji.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Harbour- ing pirates is a serious crime!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Keep up the good work out here.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: If he did, it's gonna get noisy.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Maaaaaaan, did I ever sleep well!

dialogue.speaker: Karoo
dialogue.text: Ahh! My hat! Where's my hat!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: And it's not time for break- fast.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I'm glad to see you're fine, Luffy...

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Oh hey, Zoro. Long time no see!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: You went out training again, didn't you!?

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: No means no! I'm the doctor here!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: I was asleep for three whole days!?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: And he calculated 5 meals per day.

summary: Vivi and the Straw Hats part ways without words, using their shared mark to prove their friendship while protecting her from the Navy.
